creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173911
Patch v1

Trojita 0.7 was released a while ago: http://jkt.flaska.net/blog/Trojita_0_7_with_GPG_encryption_is_available.html

The attached patch updates the port and, since Qt 5.2 is the minimum version being supported, I've also removed the mail/trojita-qt4 port and cleaned up trojita's Makefile now that it does not have a slave port any longer.
